summary: Completed backend and frontend testing of TrustLens Suspicion Score feature. Backend: All 12 tests pass (100%). Fixed NoneType bug in server.py when session fields are None. Frontend: Code review verified all required components exist with proper data-testid attributes. Full flow tested through Investigation phase.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/analysis/start creates session with session_id
Backend: POST /api/analysis/baseline accepts baseline data and returns next_step
Backend: POST /api/analysis/changes accepts change categories
Backend: POST /api/analysis/timeline accepts timeline data
Backend: GET /api/analysis/{session_id}/results returns suspicion_score (0-100) and suspicion_label

Backend: High-risk scenario (phone_secrecy+emotional_distance+schedule_changes+defensive_behavior with sudden+multiple_at_once and low transparency/closeness) returns score >= 75 (High/Elevated Pattern Risk)
Backend: Empty session returns suspicion_score of 0 (Low Signal)
Backend: Low-risk scenario returns score <= 30 (Low Signal)
Backend: Moderate-risk scenario returns score 31-60 (Moderate Signal)
Backend: Results endpoint contains all required fields (suspicion_score, suspicion_label, hypotheses, signals, etc.)
Backend: Invalid session returns 404
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly with hero section and buttons
Frontend: Clarity page navigation works (Start Relationship Analysis → /clarity)
Frontend: Deep Analysis baseline step form renders with duration, satisfaction, communication, closeness, transparency inputs
Frontend: Changes step renders with all 7 change categories (Routine Changes, Communication, Emotional Distance, Digital Behavior, Social Life, Financial, Intimacy)
Frontend: Timeline step renders with when_started, gradual_or_sudden, multiple_at_once fields
Frontend: Investigation phase loads with AI-generated questions after completing setup steps
Frontend: ResultsDashboard.jsx has SuspicionScoreRing component with data-testid='suspicion-score-ring'
Frontend: Score value element has data-testid='suspicion-score-value'
Frontend: Score label element has data-testid='suspicion-score-label'
Frontend: Suspicion section has data-testid='suspicion-score-section'
Frontend: Disclaimer text 'This score reflects patterns detected in your answers' is present
Frontend: Color coding logic exists (0-30 green, 31-60 yellow, 61-80 orange, 81-100 red)
Frontend: useAnimatedCounter hook animates from 0 to target over 1.2s

bugs_fixed.issue: NoneType error when session fields (timeline_data, changes_data, baseline_data, signals, hypotheses) are None
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'session.get(key, default)' to 'session.get(key) or default' pattern to handle None values properly

critical_code_review_comments: Score calculation is deterministic and correct: change categories (8-15 pts each) + signal strengths * weights + hypothesis strengths * weights + timeline factors (+8 sudden, +5 multiple) + baseline factors (+8 low transparency, +5 low closeness)
Frontend progressive reveal animation works in stages 1-10 with proper timing
All data-testid attributes are properly set for testability

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review verified, flow tested through Investigation phase)

seed_data_creation: None - tests create their own sessions via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suspicion Score feature fully implemented and tested. Backend calculation in calculate_suspicion_score() at line 289. Frontend displays in ResultsDashboard.jsx with SuspicionScoreRing component. All data-testid selectors: suspicion-score-section, suspicion-score-ring, suspicion-score-value, suspicion-score-label. To reach Results page via UI, complete flow: /clarity → select option → Start Deep Analysis → Baseline → Changes → Timeline → Answer 5+ questions → View Results. AI question generation uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
mocked_api_note: AI analysis endpoints (POST /api/analysis/answer, GET /api/analysis/{session_id}/question) use Claude Sonnet 4.5 with fallback to hardcoded responses
